summary: Phase-2 formant scoring pipeline: verified both bug fixes and regressions via pytest against the external preview URL. Login (mario.rossi/VocalTest2026!) works, GDPR consent gate works, /iː/ synthetic WAV now returns F1=333 Hz (was ~834 Hz), and teacher-sample reference with a RELATIVE URL for target_kind=word returns 200 with 3 per_formant entries. Dataset path for /i/ AmE still returns reference_source=dataset with a CEFR band and citation. 5/5 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: _extract_formants scans the ±60ms window in a Python while-loop at 10ms step (13 samples × 3 formants ≈ 39 Praat calls). Acceptable now but could be replaced with `Get quantile` (median) via praat call for ~2x speedup and cleaner code.

_fetch_and_extract() hard-codes http://localhost:8001. Comment explains why (works in Preview + Prod regardless of FRONTEND_URL). If the backend container ever binds a different internal port, this string must change — consider deriving from an env var (e.g. INTERNAL_BACKEND_ORIGIN) with sensible default.
seed_data_creation: None. Uses in-test synthesized WAV (impulse train through 3 cascaded resonators) — no DB writes beyond user_consents toggling.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_phoneme_formants_phase2.py. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var (required, no default). Synthesizes vowel WAVs with numpy-only IIR resonators (no scipy dependency). Toggles audio consent between tests. Reference mp3 http://localhost:8001/api/uploads/elevenlabs/u-foot_word_look_AmE_mIrm7gNC_1783527116.mp3 is present and served with 200. Measured /iː/ synthetic vowel: F1=333, F2=2061, F3=2268 Hz.
rca of the issue: BUG 1 root cause: previous mean over fixed 20-80% window folded silence + noise + plosive artefacts into F1, biasing it upward. Fix locates the loudest instant (voiced nucleus) via to_intensity() and takes the median over a ±60 ms window — median rejects Burg's occasional octave/formant-tracking outliers. BUG 2 root cause: httpx cannot fetch relative URLs; per-word audio URLs are stored as /api/uploads/... The fix in _fetch_and_extract prepends http://localhost:8001 to URLs starting with '/', then converts mp3→wav via parselmouth.Sound.save before formant extraction. Both fixes now behave as intended, confirmed by 5/5 passing tests including the exact BUG-2 reference_url.
